author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Session results: Added gpu_embed_lookup kernel (working), GPU-native decode path (decode_step_gpu), and started CUDA graph infrastructure. However, the fundamental bottleneck (600 CUDA API calls per token at ~1ms each) cannot be solved without either: (1) A raw-buffer decode engine that bypasses Tensor entirely (needed for CUDA graph capture), or (2) A completely fused decoder kernel (single kernel for entire transformer block). Both require multi-session architectural work. Current decode speed: 1.02s/tok. The profiling is definitive — compute is microseconds, overhead is everything.
